title: Acetylcholine
body_html:
Acetylcholine (ACh) is the principal neurotransmitter in the somatic nervous system.

Major neurotransmitter in the autonomic nervous system
  • all pre- and post-ganglionic parasympathetic neurons
  • all preganglionic sympathetic neurons)
  • postganglionic sympathetic fibers (sudomotor neurons to sweat glands)

In the central nervous system is synthesized in the basal nucleus of Meynert

Decreased levels are seen in the basal nucleus of Meynert in Alzheimer's disease
2
0
